keys.description: Adds a key which should be renamed

currentKey.description: The current name of the key. It is also possible to define deep keys by using dot-notation like for example: "level1.level2.currentKey".

newKey.description: The name the key should be renamed to. It is also possible to define deep keys by using dot-notation like for example: "level1.level2.newKey".

currentKey.description: The current name of the key. It is also possible to define deep keys by using dot-notation like for example: "level1.level2.currentKey".

newKey.description: The name the key should be renamed to. It is also possible to define deep keys by using dot-notation like for example: "level1.level2.newKey".

regExNotice.displayName: Be aware that by using regular expression previously renamed keys can be affected

searchRegex.description: Regex to match the key name

replaceRegex.description: The name the key/s should be renamed to. It's possible to use regex captures e.g. $1, $2, ...

caseInsensitive.description: Whether to use case insensitive match
